verses.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَ يَا اللَّهُ
verses.en: O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name: O Allah,
O Most Merciful, O Most Compassionate,
O Most Generous, O Self-Subsisting,
O Greatest, O Eternal,

verses.ar: يَا عَلِيمُ يَا حَلِيمُ يَا حَكِيمُ
verses.en: O All-Knowing, O Forbearing, O Wise.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Master of Masters,
O Acceptor of prayers,
O Elevator of rank,
O Guardian of good deeds,
O Forgiver of evil deeds,
O Granter of requests,
O Acceptor of repentance,
O Hearer of voices,
O Knower of attributes,
O Repeller of calamities.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,

O Best of benefactors.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,

O He, Who is the most powerful,
O He, Who is quick to reckon,
O He, Who metes out the severest punishment,
O He, with Whom is the excellent reward,
O He, with Whom is the Original Book.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ

verses.en: O He before Whose power everything submits,

verses.ar: يَا مَن ذَلَّ كُلُّ شَیْ‏ءٍ لِّعِزَّتِهِ
verses.en: O He before Whose might overshadows everything,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ خَضَعَ كُلُّ شَیْ‏ءٍ لِّهَيْبَتِهِ
verses.en: O He before Whose awesomeness everything is humbled,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ انْقَادَ كُلُّ شَیْ‏ءٍ مِّنْ خَشْيَتِهِ
verses.en: O He before Whose fearsomeness everything yields,

verses.ar: يَا مَن تَشَقَّقَتِ الْجِبَالُ مِن مَّخَافَتِهِ
verses.en: O He before Whose terribleness mountains shake,
O He before Whose command the heavens are raised,
O He through Whose permission in the earths are secured,
O He Whose glory the thunder proclaims,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يَعْتَدِي عَلَى أَهْلِ مَمْلَكَتِهِ

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,

O Refuge for the disobedient,
O Forgiver of the sinner,

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

O Master of peace and security,

O Master of grandeur and sovereignty,

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي مُلْكِهِ مُقِيمٌ

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي سُلْطَانِهِ قَدِيمٌ

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي جَلاَلِهِ عَظِيمٌ

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَلَى عِبَادِهِ رَحِيمٌ

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِكُلِّ شَیْ‏ءٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.en: O Knower of everything,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ عَصَاهُ حَلِيمٌ

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَن رَّجَاهُ كَرِيمٌ
verses.en: O Magnanimous to him who places his hope in Him,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي صُنْعِهِ حَكِيمٌ
verses.en: O He Who is Wise over what He has fashioned,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي حِكْمَتِهِ لَطِيفٌ
verses.en: O He Who is Subtle in his Wisdom,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي لُطْفِهِ قَدِيمٌ

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُرْجَى إِلاَّ فَضْلُهُ

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُسْأَلُ إِلاَّ عَفْوُهُ

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُنْظَرُ إِلاَّ بِرُّهُ

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُخَافُ إِلاَّ عَدْلُهُ

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يَدُومُ إِلاَّ مُلْكُهُ
verses.en: O He, Whose sovereignty alone of eternal,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا سُلْطَانَ إِلاَّ سُلْطَانُهُ
verses.en: O He, Who alone has true majesty,

verses.ar: يَا مَن وَّسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَیْ‏ءٍ رَّحْمَتُهُ
verses.en: O He, Whose blessings extend to all,
O He, Whose Wrath is surpassed by His Mercy,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَیْ‏ءٍ عِلْمُهُ

O He, Who is without equal,

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ

O Knower of secrets,
O Splitter of seed,
O Provider for creatures.

O Harmful to the unjust, O Beneficial to the just.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Grandest of all the grand,
O Most Magnanimous of all the magnanimous,
O Most Merciful of all the merciful,
O Most Knowledgeable of all knowers,
O Most Wise of all the wise,
O Most Ancient of all the ancient,
O Most Great of all the great,
O Most Benign of all the benign,
O Most Magnificent of all the magnificent,
O Most Mighty of all the mighty.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Most Magnanimous in overlooking sins,
O Greatest Benefactor,
O Most Bounteous in goodness,
O Eternal in grace,
O Eternal in subtlety,
O Creator of subtlety,
O Remover of pain,
O Healer of injury,
O Master of dominion,
O True Judge.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَهْدِهِ وَفِيٌّ
verses.en: O He Who fulfils His promise,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي وَفَائِهِ قَوِيٌّ
verses.en: O He Who is Strong in His fulfillment,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي قُوَّتِهِ عَلِيٌّ
verses.en: O He Who is great in His might,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عُلُوُّهِ قَرِيبٌ
verses.en: O He Who is near everyone in spite of His greatness,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي قُرْبِهِ لَطِيفٌ
verses.en: O He Who is benign in His weariness,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي لُطْفِهِ شَرِيفٌ
verses.en: O He Who is noble in His benignity,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي شَرَفِهِ عَزِيزٌ
verses.en: O He Who is powerful in His nobility,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عِزِّهِ عَظِيمٌ
verses.en: O He Who is great in His power,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَظَمَتِهِ مَجِيدٌ
verses.en: O He Who is exalted in His greatness,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي مَجْدِهِ حَمِيدٌ
verses.en: O He Who is praiseworthy in his exaltation.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Sufficient, O Restorer of health,
O Faithful, O Forgiver
O Guide, O Summoner,
O Judge, O Agreeable,
O High, O Eternal

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

verses.ar: يَا مَن كُلُّ شَیْ‏ءٍ خَاضِعٌ لَّهُ
verses.en: O He before Whom everything bows,

verses.ar: يَا مَن كُلُّ شَیْ‏ءٍ خَاشِعٌ لَّهُ
verses.en: O He before Whom everything is humbled,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ كُلُّ شَیْ‏ءٍ كَائِنٌ لَّهُ
verses.en: O He for Whom everything exists,

verses.ar: يَا مَن كُلُّ شَیْ‏ءٍ مَّوْجُودٌ بِهِ
verses.en: O He to Whom everything owes its existence,

verses.ar: يَا مَن كُلُّ شَیْ‏ءٍ مُّنِيبٌ إِلَيْهِ
verses.en: O He to Whom everything returns,

verses.ar: يَا مَن كُلُّ شَیْ‏ءٍ خَائِفٌ مِّنْهُ
verses.en: O He of Whom everything is afraid,

verses.ar: يَا مَن كُلُّ شَیْ‏ءٍ قَائِمٌ بِهِ
verses.en: O One to Whom everything owes its stability,

verses.ar: يَا مَن كُلُّ شَیْ‏ءٍ صَائِرٌ إِلَيْهِ
verses.en: O He towards Whom everything retreats,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ كُلُّ شَیْ‏ءٍ يُّسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدِهِ
verses.en: O He Whom everything glorifies with praise,

verses.ar: يَا مَن كُلُّ شَیْ‏ءٍ هَاِلكٌ إِلاَّ وَجْهَهُ
verses.en: O He besides Whom everything is perishable.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا مَفَرَّ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ
verses.en: O He-there is no retreat but towards Him,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا مَفْزَعَ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ
verses.en: O He-there is no place of protection except with Him,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا مَقْصَدَ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ
verses.en: O He—there is no right path except that which leads to Him,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا مَنجَىً مِنْهُ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ
verses.en: O He-there is no shelter against Him but with Him,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُرْغَبُ إِلاَّ إلَيهِ
verses.en: O He-there is no inclination towards anyone except Him,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا حَوْلَ وَلا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِهِ
verses.en: O He-there is no strength and vigour but from Him,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُسْتَعَانُ إِلاَّ بِهِ
verses.en: O He-none is invoked for help but He.

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُتَوَكَّلُ إِلاَّ عَلَيْهِ
verses.en: O He-trust is not reposed in anyone but He,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُرْجَى إِلاَّ هُوَ
verses.en: O He-hope is not entertained from anyone except from He,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُعْبَدُ إِلاَّ هُوَ
verses.en: O He-none is worshipped except He

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Best of those who are feared,
O Best of those who are liked,
O Best of those who are sought,
O Best of those who are entreated,
O Best of those who are longed for,
O Best of those who are remembered,
O Best of those to whom thanks are offered,
O Best of those who are loved,
O Best of those who are called on,
O Best of those who are held in affection.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Forgiver, O Concealer [of defects]

verses.ar: يَا قَادِرُ يَا قَاهِرُ يَا فَاطِرُ
verses.en: O Mighty, O Supreme, O Creator,
O Shatterer, O Joiner,

verses.ar: يَا ذَاكِرُ يَا نَاظِرُ يَا نَاصِرُ
verses.en: O Rememberer, O Seeing, O Helper.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He Who created and perfected,
O He Who made everything to measure and guided,
O He Who removes misfortunes,
O He Who overhears secrets,
O He Who rescues the drowning,
O He Who saves the distressed,
O He Who restores the sick to health,
O He who makes [His slaves] laugh and weep,
O He Who causes to dies and calls to life,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الزَّوْجَيْنِ الذَّكَرَ وَالأُنْثَى
verses.en: O He Who has created pairs of male and female.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

verses.ar: يَا مَن فِي الْبَرِّ وَالْبَحْرِ سَبِيلُهُ
verses.en: O He Whose course is on land and in water,
O He Whose signs are in the universe,
O He in Whose signs are undeniable proofs,
O He Whose; might is exhibited in causing death,
O He Whose lesson is in graves,
O He Whose kingdom will be on the Day of Judgement,
O He in Whose reckoning of deeds is His dread,
O He in Whose balance is His order,
O He Whose paradise is the place of His good reward,
O He Whose hell is the place of chastisement.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He-the frightened flee to Him,
O He-sinners take shelter with Him,
O He-the repentant return to Him,
O He-the pious incline towards Him,
O He-the confounded seek shelter in Him,
O He-the desirous have affliction for Him,
O He-lovers are proud of Him,

verses.ar: يَا مَن فِي عَفْوِهِ يَطْمَعُ الْخَاطِئُونَ
verses.en: O He-transgressors have agreed for His forgiveness,
O He-those who are sure in faith receive consolation from Him,
O He-those who trust Him rely on Him.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Friend, O physician,
O Near, O Supervisor,
O Reckoner to account, O Awsome,
O Rewarder, O Acceptor,
O Aware, O All-Seeing.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Nearest of all,
O Friendliest of all the friends,
O Possessor Of greater insight than all others,
O Most Aware of all
O Noblest of all the nobles,
O Most Exalted of all the exalted,
O Mightiest of all mighty,
O Most Independent of all,
O Most Generous of all,
O Kindest of all those who are kind

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Dominant who is not overpowered,
O Designer who is not made.
O Creator who is not created,
O Master and not the slave,
O All-Dominant who is not dominated,
O Exalter and the Exalted,
O Protector who needs no protection,
O Helper who needs no help,
O Witness who is not absent,
O Near who is not distant.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Light of lights,
O Illuminator of light,
O Creator of light
O Planner of light,
O Estimator of light,
O Light of all lights,
O Light that precedes in existence every light,
O Light that will survive all lights,
O Light that is above every light,
O Light like of which there is no light.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He Whose gift is noble,
O He Whose action is subtle,
O He Whose kindness is persistent,
O He Whose beneficence is eternal,
O He Whose word is right,
O He Whose promise is true,
O He Whose forgiveness is a grace,
O He Whose chastisement is justice,
O He Whose remembrance is sweet,
O He Whose grace is universal.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Facilitator, O Separator,
O Alterer, O Humiliating of the proud,
O Degrader, O Benefactor,
O Munificent, O Giver of respite,
O Grantor of respite, O Virtuous,

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He Who sees but is not seen,
O He Who creates and is not created,
O He Who guides and is not guided,
O He Who receives to life and is not brought to life,
O He Who questions and is not questioned,
O He Who feeds and does not eat,

verses.ar: يَا مَن يُّجِيرُ وَلا يُجَارُ عَلَيْهِ
verses.en: O He Who gives protection and is in no need of protection,

verses.ar: يَا مَن يَّقْضِي وَلا يُقْضَى عَلَيْهِ
verses.en: O He Who judges and against Whom no judgement is passed,

verses.ar: يَا مَن يَّحْكُمُ وَلا يُحْكَمُ عَلَيْهِ
verses.en: O He Who commands but is not commanded:

verses.ar: يَا مَن لَّمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
verses.en: O He Who begets not, nor is He begotten,
And there is none like unto Him.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Best reckoner,
O Best physician,
O Best guardian,
O Best near one,
O Best responder,
O Best friend,
O Best surety,
O Best protector,
O Best master,
O Best helper.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Joy of saints,
O Desire of friends.
O Friend of seekers,
O Friend of penitents,
O Provider of sustenance to the poor,
O Hope of sinners,
O Coolness of worshippers' eyes,
O Remover Of sufferers' pain,
O Dispeller of the sorrows of the sorrowful,
O Allah of the first and the last generation.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O our Lord, O our Allah,
O our Chief, O our Master,
O our Helper, O our Protector,
O our Guide, O our Aider,
O our Friend, O our Physician.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Lord of the prophets and the virtuous,
O Lord of the righteous and chosen one,
O Lord of paradise and hell,
O Lord of the small and the great,
O Lord of grains and fruits,
O Lord of canals and trees,
O Lord of forest and desert,
O Lord of lands and seas,
O Lord of night and day,
O Lord of the manifest and the hidden.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

verses.ar: يَا مَن نَّفَذَ فِي كُلِّ شَیْ‏ءٍ أَمْرُهُ
verses.en: O He, Whose command operates in everything,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لَّحِقَ بِكُلِّ شَیْ‏ءٍ عِلْمُهُ
verses.en: O He, Whose knowledge encompasses everything,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ بَلَغَتْ إِلَى كُلِّ شَیْ‏ءٍ قُدْرَتُهُ
verses.en: O He, Whose control extends to everything,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُحْصِي الْعِبَادُ نِعَمَهُ
verses.en: O He, Whose bounties cannot be counted by His slaves,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا تَبْلُغُ الْخَلائِقُ شُكْرَهُ
verses.en: O He, Whom His creatures cannot adequately thank,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا تُدْرِكُ الأَفْهَامُ جَلاَلَهُ
verses.en: O He, Whose grandeur cannot be comprehended by the intellect,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا تَنَالُ الأَوْهَامُ كُنْهَهُ
verses.en: O He, Whose reality cannot be acquired by the imagination,
O He, Whose garb is majesty and greatness,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يَرُدُّ الْعِبَادُ قَضَاءَهُ
verses.en: O He, Whose judgement cannot be reversed by His slave,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا مُلْكَ إِلا مُلْكُهُ
verses.en: O He, Whose alone is the kingdom and no one else'

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا عَطَاءَ إِلا عَطَاؤُهُ
verses.en: O He, Whose alone is the gift and none else's,

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, for Whom are noblest examples,
O He, for Whom are high attributes,
O He, Who is the Master of the beginning and the end,
O He, Who is the Master of the abode of paradise,
O He, for Whom are great signs,
O He, for Whom are beautiful names,
O He, for Whom is order and judgement,
O He, Who rules over the atmosphere and the expanse,
O He, Whose is the Lordship of the highest heaven and the earth,
O He, Who is the Master of the high heavens.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Pardoner, O Forgiver,
O Patient, O Greatest appreciator (of good),
O Kind, O Sympathetic,
O Besought, O Friend,
O Most Glorified, O Most Holy.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Whose greatness is in the heavens,
O He, Whose signs are on the earth,

verses.ar: يَا مَن فِي كُلِّ شَیْ‏ءٍ دَلائِلُهُ
verses.en: O He, Whose proofs are manifest in everything,
O He, Whose wonders are in the seas,
O He, Whose treasures are in the mountains,

verses.ar: يَا مَن يَّبْدَأُ الْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُ
verses.en: O He, Who originated Creation which then returns to Him,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ إِلَيْهِ يَرْجِعُ الأَمْرُ كُلُّهُ
verses.en: O He, towards Whom is the return of every matter,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ أَظْهَرَ فِي كُلِّ شَیْ‏ءٍ لُّطْفَهُ
verses.en: O, Whose Kindness is evident in everything,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ أَحْسَنَ كُلَّ شَیْ‏ءٍ خَلَقَهُ
verses.en: O He, Who makes best everything which He has created,

verses.ar: يَا مَن تَصَرَّفَ فِي الْخَلائِقِ قُدْرَتُهُ
verses.en: O He, Whose authority is wielded over all creatures.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

verses.ar: يَا حَبِيبَ مَن لا حَبِيبَ لَهُ
verses.en: O Friend of he who has no friend,

verses.ar: يَا طَبِيبَ مَن لا طَبِيبَ لَهُ
verses.en: O Physician of he who has no physician,

verses.ar: يَا مُجِيبَ مَن لا مُجِيبَ لَهُ
verses.en: O Responder to he who has no responder,

verses.ar: يَا شَفِيقَ مَن لا شَفِيقَ لَهُ
verses.en: O Affectionate One to he whom none hold in affection,

verses.ar: يَا رَفِيقَ مَن لا رَفِيقَ لَهُ
verses.en: O Friend of he who has no friend,

verses.ar: يَا مُغِيثَ مَن لا مُغِيثَ لَهُ
verses.en: O Helper of he who has no help,

verses.ar: يَا دَلِيلَ مَن لا دَلِيلَ لَهُ
verses.en: O Guide of he who has no guide,

verses.ar: يَا أَنِيسَ مَن لا أَنِيسَ لَهُ
verses.en: O Associate of the forlorn,

verses.ar: يَا رَاحِمَ مَن لا رَاحِمَ لَهُ
verses.en: O Merciful One towards he on whom no one has mercy,

verses.ar: يَا صَاحِبَ مَن لا صَاحِبَ لَهُ
verses.en: O Companion of he who has no companion.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Sufficer for those who seek sufficiency,
O Guide for those who seek guidance,
O Protector for those who seek protection,
O Granter for concession to those who seek concession,
O Healer for those who seek cure,
O Just One for those who seek justice,
O Bestower of wealth for those who seek wealth,
O Fulfiller of promises for those who seek fulfillment,
O Granter of strength for those who seek strength,
O Aider of those who seek aid.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah , verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Creator, O Provider of sustenance,
O Creator of speech, O Truthful,
O Splitter, O Separator,
O Breaker, O Combiner,
O Foremost, O Most High.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who changes night and day,
O He, Who has created darkness and light,
O He, Who has bestowed shade and heat,
O He, Who has brought into subjection the sun and the moon,
O He, Who has ordained virtue and vice,
O He, Who has created death and life,
O He, Who has made the body and the soul,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لَّمْ يَتِّخِذْ صَاحِبَةً وَّلا وَلَداً
verses.en: O He, Who has neither taken a wife nor begotten any child,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن لَّيْسَ لَهُ شَرِيكٌ فِي الْمُلْكِ
verses.en: O He, Who has no partner in His sovereignty,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لَّمْ يَكُن لَّهُ وَلِيٌّ مِّنَ الذُّلِّ
verses.en: O He, Who has no friend among the disgraced.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who knows the desire of the desirous,
O He, Who knows the conscience of the silent,
O He, who hears the cries of the weak,
O He, Who sees the lamentation of the frightened,
O He, Who satisfies the needs of the petitioner,
O He, Who accepts the excuse of the repentant,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُصْلِحُ عَمَلَ الْمُفْسِدِينَ
verses.en: O He, Who does not correct the actions of the mischievous,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُضِيعُ أَجْرَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.en: O He, Who does not waste the good reward of the virtuous,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يَبْعُدُ عَن قُلُوبِ الْعَارِفِينَ
verses.en: O He, Who is not absent from the mind of the saint,
O the most Magnanimous of all those who show magnanimity.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Eternal Living,
O Hearer of prayers,
O Liberal Bestower
O Forgiver of sins,
O Creator of the sky,
O Best tester of trials,
O Most Praiseworthy,
O Eternally Great,
O Greatest fulfiller of promises,
O Best Recompenser.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Best concealer of defects, O Best forgiver,
O Most dominant, O Supreme,
O Most patient, O Most virtuous,
O Most exalted, O Best opener,
O Blower of winds, O Bestower of Happiness.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who created me and perfected me,
O He, Who provided me with sustenance and nurtured me,
O He, Who provided food for me and quenched my thirst,
O He, Who brought me near Him and brought me most nigh,
O He, Who protected me and kept me in safety,
O He, Who saved and guarded me,
O He, Who honoured me and enriched me,
O He, Who helped and guided me,
O He, Who befriended me and sheltered me,
O He, Who causes me to die and revivifies me.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who maintains truth by His words,

verses.ar: يَا مَن يَّقْبَلُ التَّوْبَةَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِ
verses.en: O He, Who accepts repentance from His slaves,

verses.ar: يَا مَن يَّحُولُ بَيْنَ الْمَرْءِ وَقَلْبِهِ
verses.en: O He, Who stands between man and his heart,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا تَنْفَعُ الشَّفَاعَةُ إِلا بِإِذْنِهِ
verses.en: O He, without Whose permission intercession has no benefit,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَنْ سَبِيلِهِ
verses.en: O He, Who knows well who is astray from His path,
O He, Whose order no one can reverse,
O He, Whose judgement no one can revoke,

verses.ar: يَا مَنِ انْقَادَ كُلُّ شَیْ‏ءٍ لأَمْرِهِ
verses.en: O He, Whose order is obeyed by everything,
O He, in Whose Right Hand the heavens shall be rolled up,

verses.ar: يَا مَن يُّرْسِلُ الرِّيَاحَ بُشْريً بَيْنَ يَدَيْ رَحْمَتِهِ
verses.en: O He, Who has made earth a cradle,

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who sends forth the winds bearing good tiding before His mercy.
O He, Who has made the mountains pegs,
O He, Who has made the sun a lamp,
O He, Who has made the moon a light,
O He, Who has made the night a covering,
O He, Who has made the day for seeking livelihood,
O He, Who has made sleep a rest,
O He, Who has made the sky a vault,
O He, Who has created things in pairs,
O He, Who has made hell an ambush, barking for sinners.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O All-hearer, O Mediator,
O Sublime, O Invincible,
O Swift, O Originator,
O Great, O Omnipotent,
O Knowing, O Supporter.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Everliving, preceding every living being,
O Everliving, succeeding every living being,

verses.ar: يَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ حَيٌّ
verses.en: O Everliving, like unto Whom there is none,

verses.ar: يَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي لا يُشَارِكُهُ حَيٌّ
verses.en: O Everliving, Who has no living partner,

verses.ar: يَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي لا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى حَيٍّ
verses.en: O Everliving, Who is not dependent on any living being,

verses.ar: يَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي يُمِيتُ كُلَّ حَيٍّ
verses.en: O Everliving, Who causes every living being to die,

verses.ar: يَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي يَرْزُقُ كُلَّ حَيٍّ
verses.en: O Everliving, Who provides sustenance to every living being,

verses.ar: يَّا حَيّاً لَّمْ يَرِثِ الْحَيَاةَ مِنْ حَيٍّ
verses.en: O Everliving, Who has not inherited life from any living being,
O Everliving, Who quickens the dead,

verses.ar: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ، لا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةً وَّلا نَوْمٌ
verses.en: O Everliving, O Self-Subsistent, Slumber seizeth Him not, nor sleep.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

verses.ar: يَا مَن لَّهُ ذِكْرٌ لا يُنْسَى
verses.en: O He, Whose remembrance is not forgotten,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لَّهُ نُورٌ لا يُطْفَى
verses.en: O He, Whose light is not extinguished

verses.ar: يَا مَن لَّهُ نِعَمٌ لا تُعَدُّ
verses.en: O He, Whose bounties are countless,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن لَّهُ مُلْكٌ لا يَزُولُ
verses.en: O He, Whose grandeur is perpetual,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لَّهُ ثَنَاءٌ لا يُحْصَى
verses.en: O He, Whose praise does not admit of alteration,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لَّهُ جَلاَلٌ لا يُكَيَّفُ
verses.en: O He, Whose glory is not framed,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لَّهُ كَمَالٌ لا يُدْرَكُ
verses.en: O He, Whose perfection cannot be comprehended,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لَّهُ قَضَاءٌ لا يُرَدُّ
verses.en: O He, Whose order is not rejected,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لَّهُ صِفَاتٌ لا تُبَدَّلُ،
verses.en: O He, Whose attributes do not change,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لَّهُ نُعُوتٌ لا تُغَيَّرُ
verses.en: O He, Whose attributes do not alter,

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Lord of all the worlds,
O Master of the Day of Judgement,
O Ultimate Goal of the seeker,
O Refuge of the seeker of shelter,
O Overtaker of the fugitive,
O He Who loves the patient,
O He, Who loves the repentant,
O He, Who loves the pure,
O He, Who loves the virtuous
O He, Who knows best the guided,

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Affectionate, O Companion,
O Protector, O Encompasser,
O Provider of sustenance, O Aider of seekers of aid,
O Honourer, O Humiliating,
O Creator, O He Who causes to return.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَحَدٌ بِلاَ ضِدٍّ
verses.en: O He, Who is single and without opposite,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فَرْدٌ بِلاَ نِدٍّ
verses.en: O He, Who is Unique, O He, Who is Peerless,
O He, Who is Independent and without any defect,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ وِتْرٌ بِلاَ كَيْفٍ
verses.en: O He, Who is without changing state,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ قَاضٍ بِلاَ حَيْفٍ
verses.en: O He, Who judges without injustice,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ رَبٌّ بِلاَ وَزِيرٍ
verses.en: O He, Who is the Lord Cherisher,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَزِيزٌ بِلاَ ذُلٍّ
verses.en: O He, Who is Mighty without disgrace,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ غَنِيٌّ بِلاَ فَقْرٍ
verses.en: O He, Who is Independent without any need,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ مَلِكٌ بِلاَ عَزْلٍ
verses.en: O He, Who is the King without any censure,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ مَوْصُوفٌ بِلاَ شَبِيهٍ
verses.en: O He, Whose attributes are matchless.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Whose remembrance is an honour for those who remember Him,
O He, Whose gratitude is success for the grateful,
O He, Whose praise is the pride of the praiser,
O He, the obedience to Whom is salvation for the obedient
O He, Whose door is open to the seeker,
O He, the path leading to Whom is clear for the repentant,
O He, Whose signs are proofs for the observers,
O He, Whose Book is advice to the pious,

verses.ar: يَا مَن رِّزْقُهُ عُمُومٌ لِّلطَّائِعِينَ وَالْعَاصِينَ
verses.en: O He, Whose provision, is love the obedient and disobedient alike,

verses.ar: يَا مْن رَّحْمَتُهُ قَرِيبٌ مِّنَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.en: O He, Whose mercy is close to the virtuous.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Whose name is glorious,
O He, Whose honour is exalted,
O He-there is no deity except Him,
O He-great is His praise,
O He, Whose names are sacred,
O He, Whose existence is eternal,
O He, Whose glory is His ornament,
O He, Whose greatness is His covering,
O He, Whose favours are countless,
O He, Whose bounties cannot be enumerated.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Helper, O Trustworthy,
O Manifest, O Powerful,
O Firm, O True Guide,
O Praiseworthy, O Glorious,
O Strong, O Witness

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Lord of the Glorious Throne,
O He, Whose words are right.
O Master of great deeds,
O He, Whose punishment is severe
O Master of promise and threat,
O He, Who is guardian and the most praised one,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فَعَّالٌ لِّمَا يُرِيدُ
verses.en: O He, Who is the mighty doer of whatever He wills,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ هُوَ قَرِيبٌ غَيْرُ بَعِيدٍ
verses.en: O He, Who is near and not far,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَیْ‏ءٍ شَهِيدٌ،
verses.en: O He, Who is Witness to everything,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ هُوَ لَيْسَ بِظَلاَّمٍ لِّلْعَبِيدِ
verses.en: O He, Who is not the least cruel to his slaves,

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَلاوَزَيرَ،
verses.en: O He, Who has no partner and no adviser,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا شَبِيهَ لَهُ وَلا نَظِيرَ
verses.en: O He, Who has no equal and no match,
O Creator of the sun and the bright moon,
O Enricher of the poverty stricken,
O Provider of sustenance to small children,
O Merciful to the very aged ones,
O Joiner of broken bones,
O Protector of the frightened shelter seekers,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِعِبَادِهِ خَبَيِرٌ بَصِيرٌ،
verses.en: O He , Who is All-Aware and All-Seeing of his slaves,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَیْ‏ءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.en: O He, Who is Powerful over everything.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Master of generosity and the Bestower of the bounties,
O Gracious and Magnanimous,
O Creator of the Tablet and the Pen,
O Creator of ants and men,
O Inflictor of punishment and retaliator,
O Inspirer of Arabs and non-Arabs,
O Expeller of pain and grief,
O He, Who knows the secrets and the mysteries,
O Lord of the Kaaba and the Sacred Precinct,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الأَشْيَاءَ مِنَ الْعَدَمِ
verses.en: O He, Who has created everything out of nothingness,

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Doer, O Creator
O Acceptor, O Perfect,
O Gracious, O Separator
O Just, O Dominant,
O Seeker, O Generous

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who graciously bestows His bounties on us,
O He, Who honours us with His charity,
O He, Who rewards us out of His beneficing,
O He, Who makes us respectable with His might,
O He, Who predestines with His wisdom,
O He, Who judges with His planning,
O He, Who decrees with His knowledge,
O He, Who is forbearing with His forbearance,
O He, Who is near us in spite of His exaltation,
O He, Who is exalted despite His nearness.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who creates whatever He wishes,
O He, Who does whatever He wishes,
ya may-yah-de may-yasha-u
ya may-yudhil-lu may-yasha-u
ya may-yua'dh-dhibu may-yasha-u
O He, Who forgives whomever He wishes,
ya may-yui`iz-zu may-yasha-u
ya may-yudhil-lu may-yasha-u

verses.ar: يَا مَن يُّصَوِّرُ فِي الأَرْحَامِ مَا يَشَاءُ
verses.en: O He, Who fashions in the womb as He wishes,

verses.ar: يَا مَن يَّخْتَصُّ بِرَحْمَتِهِ مَن يَّشَاءُ
verses.en: O He, Who chooses for His mercy whoever He wishes.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

verses.ar: يَا مَن لَّمْ يَتَّخِذْ صَاحِبَةً وَّلاوَلَداً
verses.en: O He, Who has neither wife nor child,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن جَعَلَ لِكُلِّ شَیْ‏ءٍ قَدْراً
verses.en: O He, Who creates everything in a fixed measure,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن لا يُشْرِكُ فِي حُكْمِهِ أَحَداً
verses.en: O He, Who has no partner in His rule,
O He, Who appointed angels as messengers,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن جَعَلَ فِي السَّمَاءِ بُرُوجاً
verses.en: O He, Who made constellations in the heaven,
O He, Who made the earth a place of abode,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ خَلَقَ مِنَ الْمَاءِ بَشَراً
verses.en: O He, Who created man from water,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن جَعَلَ لِكُلِّ شَیْ‏ءٍ أَمَداً
verses.en: O He, Who fixed a period for everything,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَیْ‏ءٍ عِلْماً
verses.en: O He, Whose knowledge encompasses everything,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ أَحْصَى كُلَّ شَیْ‏ءٍ عَدَداً
verses.en: O He, Who knows the number and quantity of everything.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O First, O Last,
O Manifest, O Hidden,
O Virtuous, O Right,
O He, O Unique,
O Independent, O Eternal

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Best recognized of all the recognized,
O Best of all to be worshipped,
O Greatest of those to whom thanks are due,
O Most remembered of all who are remembered,
O Most praiseworthy of all those who are praised,
O Eternal Existent who is sought,
O Highest of those who are praised,
O Greatest of the purposes which are striven for,
O Most liberal giver who is requested,
O Noblest Friend who is known.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Friend of those who weep,
O Refuge of those who trust in Him,
O Guide of the misguided,
O Master of the faithful,
O Friend of worshippers,
O Shelter of the sorrowful,
O Redeemer of the truthful,
O Mightiest of all,
O the most Knowledgeable of all beings.
O Allah of the entire Creation,

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He, Who is high and dominant,
O He, Who is masterful and powerful,
O He, Who is hidden and aware,
O He, Who is worshipped and who appreciates,
O He, Who is disobeyed and yet forgives,
O He, Whom thought cannot encompass,
O He, Whom eyes cannot see,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن لا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ أثَرٌ
verses.en: O He, from Whom nothing is concealed,
O Provider of Sustenance to mankind,
O He, Who ordained all destinies.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Protector, O Maker,
O Creator, O All-generous,
O Revealer, O Victorious,
O Disclosers, O Guarantor,
O Commander, O Prohibiter.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يَعْلَمُ الْغَيْبَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
verses.en: O He, besides Whom no one knows the secrets,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يَصْرِفُ السُّوءَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
verses.en: O He, besides Whom no one drives away calamities,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يَخْلُقُ الْخَلْقَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
verses.en: O He, besides Whom no one creates,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يَغْفِرُ الذَّنْبَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
verses.en: O He, besides Whom no one forgives sins,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُتِمُّ النِّعْمَةَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
verses.en: O He, besides Whom no one perfects the bounties,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُقَلِّبُ الْقُلُوبَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
verses.en: O He, besides Whom no one transforms hearts,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُدَبِّرُ الأَمْرَ إِلاَّ هُو
verses.en: O He, besides Whom no one manages affairs,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُنَزِّلُ الْغَيْثَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
verses.en: O He, besides Whom no one holds the reins,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يَبْسُطُ الرِّزْقَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
verses.en: O He, besides Whom no one increases sustenance,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يُحْيِي الْمَوْتَى إِلاَّ هُوَ
verses.en: O He, besides Whom no one revives the dead.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Helper of the weak,
O Companion of the strangers,
O Helper of [His] friends,
O Overpowerer of the enemies,
O Elevator of the sky,
O Genial to the chosen ones,
O Friend of the pious,
O Treasure of the indigent,
O Lord of the rich,
O Most benign of all.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He Who is self-sufficient from everything,
O He Who is established over everything,
O He, nothing is like unto Him,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن لا يَزِيدُ فِي مُلْكِهِ شَيْءٌ
verses.en: O He, nothing extends His Kingdom,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن لا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ شَيْءٌ
verses.en: O He from Whom nothing is hidden,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن لا يَنقُصُ مِنْ خَزَائِنِهِ شَيْءٌ
verses.en: O He, nothing decreases His treasure,
O He, nothing is like unto Him,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن لا يَعْزُبُ عَنْ عِلْمِهِ شَيْءٌ
verses.en: O He, Whose Knowledge encompasses everything,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ خَبِيرٌ بِكُلِّ شَیْ‏ءٍ
verses.en: O He, Who is All-Aware,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن وَّسِعَتْ رَحْمَتُهُ كُلَّ شَیْ‏ءٍ
verses.en: O He, Whose mercy extends to everything.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Generous, O Provider,
O Bestower of bounties, O Bestower of gifts,
O Enricher, O Giver of Shelter
O Destroyer, O Quickener,
O Satisfier, O Who grants salvation,

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O First and the Last,
O Lord of everything and its Master,
O Lord Cherisher of everything and its Fashioner
O Creator of everything and its Maker,
O Controller of everything and its Extender,
O Origin of everything and its Return,
O Originator of everything and its estimator,
O Creator of everything and its destroyer,
O Quickener of everything and Maker of its death,
O Author of everything and its inheritor.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Best Rememberer and Remembered,
O Best Appreciator and Appreciated,
O Best Praiser and Praised,
O Best Witness and Witnessed,
O Best Inviter and Invited,
O Best Responder and Responded,
O Best Comforter and Counselor,
O Best Friend and Companion,
O Most Desired and Sought,
O Most Affectionate and Loved.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَن دَعَاهُ مُجِيبٌ
verses.en: O Allah, the Answerer to him who calls Him,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَنْ أَطَاعَهُ حَبِيبٌ
verses.en: O Friend of him who obeys Him,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ إِلَى مَنْ أَحَبَّهُ قَرِيبٌ
verses.en: O He, Who is close to him who loves Him,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنِ اسْتَحْفَظَهُ رَقِيبٌ
verses.en: O Protector of one who seeks protection,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَن رَّجَاهُ كَرِيمٌ
verses.en: O Allah Who is Generous to him who is hopeful of Him,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ عَصَاهُ حَلِيمٌ
verses.en: O Allah, Who is Forbearing to one who disobeys Him,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَظَمَتِهِ رَحِيمٌ
verses.en: O Allah, Who is Merciful in spite of His Grandeur,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي حِكْمَتِهِ عَظِيمٌ
verses.en: O Allah, Who is Great in His Wisdom,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي إِحْسَانِهِ قَدِيمٌ
verses.en: O Allah, Who is Eternal in his Benevolence,

verses.ar: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ أَرَادَهُ عَلِيمٌ
verses.en: O Allah, Who is Aware of one who seeks Him.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Primal Cause, O Creator of desire,

verses.ar: يَا مُقَلِّبُ يَا مُعَقِّبُ يَا مُرَتِّبُ
verses.en: O Changer, O Inflictor, O Organizer,

verses.ar: يَا مُخَوِّفُ يَا مُحَذِّرُ يَا مُذَكِّرُ
verses.en: O Awful, O Saver, O Reminder,
O Subjector, O Displacer.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O He Whose Knowledge is eternal,
O He Whose Promise is true,
O He Whose Benignity is manifest,
O He Whose Command is overruling,
O He Whose Book is clear and final,
O He Whose Judgement is inevitable,
O He Whose Qur'an is glorious,
O He Whose Rule is eternal,
O He Whose Favour is common to all,
O He Whose Throne is great.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يَشْغَلُهُ سَمْعٌ عَن سَمْعٍ
verses.en: O He-listening to one individual does not prevent Him from listening to others simultaneously,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن لا يَمْنَعُهُ فِعْلٌ عَن فِعْلٍ
verses.en: O He-doing one thing does not prevent Him from doing other things simultaneously,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن لا يُلْهِيهِ قَوْلٌ عَن قَوْلٍ
verses.en: O He-the speech of one person does not make Him heedless of the simultaneous speech of others,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن لا يُغَلِّطُهُ سُؤَالٌ عَن سُؤَالٍ
verses.en: O He-one request does not make Him forgetful of other requests,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن لا يَحْجُبُهُ شَيْءٌ عَن شَیْ‏ءٍ
verses.en: O He-the sight of one thing does not prevent him from seeing other things simultaneously,

verses.ar: يَّا مَن لا يُبْرِمُهُ إِلْحَاحُ الْمُلِحِّينَ
verses.en: O He-the plaintive cries of those who weep and lament do not bother Him,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ هُوَ غَايَةُ مُرَادِ الْمُرِيدِينَ
verses.en: O He Who is the ultimate Aim of the efforts of saints,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُنتَهَى هِمَمِ الْعَارِفِينَ
verses.en: O He Who is the Goal of Gnostics,

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُنتَهَى طَلَبِ الطَّاِلبِينَ
verses.en: O He Who is the Goal of seekers,

verses.ar: يَا مَن لا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ ذَرَّةٌ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ
verses.en: O He from Whom not a single particle in the worlds is hidden.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
O Forbearing Who does not make haste,
O Generous Who is never a miser,
O True Who never breaks the promise
O Munificent Who never regrets,
O Dominant Who is never overpowered,
O Great Who is indescribable
O Just Who is never oppressive,
O Bounteous Who is never rapacious,
O Great Who does not become small,
O Protector Who does not neglect.

verses.ar: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
verses.en: Praise be to You, there is no god but You ,
[I beseech you for] relief, relief
Protect us from the Fire, O Lord.
